call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright. Sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Look, you guys called me yesterday. Where did you even *get* my number? 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: I don't need rewards points! I need a reasonable interest rate! This is ridiculous. I'm not interested. Don't call me again. 
Agent: Sir, please… 
Robert: (Hangs up)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David calling from Finance Solutions. Your friend, Michael, referred you for a Personal Loan. How are you today? 
Jessica: Hey, yeah, Michael mentioned you guys. I'm good, busy though. 
Agent: Understandable! So, we can offer you a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What are you planning to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm thinking of starting a small business, like a little online shop. 
Agent: That's fantastic! Entrepreneurial spirit! The monthly payments would be around $290 for 60 months. We also have options for 36 and 48-month terms. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. What's the catch? 
Agent: No catch! Just a small application fee of $100. And, of course, responsible repayment. 
Jessica: Can we maybe lower the interest rate a little? I have excellent credit. 
Agent: Let me see what I can do… (typing sounds) Okay, I can offer you 7.29% if you agree to automatic payments. 
Jessica: That's better. Yeah, I can do automatic payments. 
Agent: Wonderful! Let's get the application started…

Agent: Hello David, this is Lisa from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
David: Oh, yeah, I was just checking things out. 
Agent: Great! We can offer you a $1000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 17.99%. It's a great card for building credit or making small purchases. 
David: 17.99%? That seems a little high, doesn't it? I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: Well, your credit score is… uh… good, but not excellent. That's why the rate is a bit higher. 
David: I see. I think I'll pass for now. I need to shop around a bit more. 
Agent: Okay, no problem. Would you like me to send you some information via email? 
David: Yeah, that would be great. Thanks. 
Agent: You're welcome. Have a good day!

Agent: Hello Ms. Rodriguez, this is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a Personal Loan… 
Maria: (Interrupting) Are you kidding me?! This is the *third* time you people have called me this week! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are offering a $5000 Personal Loan at a rate of 24.99%… 
Maria: 24.99?! I can't afford that! You're preying on people! I'm reporting you to the Better Business Bureau! And I want my number removed from your list *immediately*! 
Agent: Ma'am, please… 
Maria: (Hangs up abruptly)
